case_title: VERNON FRISON VS. BAY AREA AUTOMOBILE SERVICES INC. DBA EXCELLEMT AU

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT. THE REQUEST DID NOT ESTABLISH GROUNDS FOR RECONSIDERATION IN THAT IT DID NOT PRESENT NEW EVIDENCE THAT COULD NOT HAVE BEEN PRESENTED AT TIME OF TRIAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA AUTOMOBILE SERVICES INC. DBA EXCELLEMT AU TOMOTIVE AND REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
